past_challenges.raw: Course registration freshman year was an absolute nightmare — I had no idea what prerequisite chains meant or how the registration system even worked. I accidentally enrolled in an upper-division class I couldn't handle and had to drop it two weeks in.

I spent the first two weeks of school completely lost, both literally and figuratively. I couldn't find half my classrooms and didn't even know where the advising office was until a friend walked me there.
